name: @dev/feature-flags
description: Feature flags system for the monorepo

scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @dev/feature-flags-core lint && pnpm --filter @dev/feature-flags-sdk-node lint && pnpm --filter @dev/feature-flags-sdk-react lint && pnpm --filter @dev/feature-flags-server lint && pnpm --filter @dev/feature-flags-dashboard lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @dev/feature-flags-core typecheck && pnpm --filter @dev/feature-flags-sdk-node typecheck && pnpm --filter @dev/feature-flags-sdk-react typecheck && pnpm --filter @dev/feature-flags-server typecheck && pnpm --filter @dev/feature-flags-dashboard typecheck
